notes: v396 — NEW: on days the 🤖 auto-pilot buys, it now also sends that day's picks (share, quantity, buy price, 🎯 target, 🛑 stop) to your own private server queue, where the separate desktop bridge program can PREVIEW them against real-money safety caps — a dry-run rehearsal that places nothing. To be clear and honest: nothing about the app changes, the bot still trades PRACTICE money only, and no real order can be placed by any part of this. You'll simply see a small '📤 sent to the auto-trade bridge queue' line in the bot's 📜 diary on buy days. If you don't run the bridge, nothing changes at all. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
